det_check_template:
proof fn det_replace<T: ?Sized>(self_: &PCell<T>, pre_perm: PointsTo<T>, in_v: T, post1_perm: PointsTo<T>, r1: T, post2_perm: PointsTo<T>, r2: T)
    where T: Sized
    requires (self_.id() == pre_perm.id()),
    ensures
        ({
            &&& (post1_perm.id() == pre_perm.id())
            &&& (post1_perm.value() == in_v)
            &&& (r1 == pre_perm.value())
            &&& (post2_perm.id() == pre_perm.id())
            &&& (post2_perm.value() == in_v)
            &&& (r2 == pre_perm.value())
        }) ==> det_replace_equal::<T>(r1, r2, post1_perm, post2_perm),
{
{ASSUMES}}
